field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable this rule for live flow application matching.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional note to describe why this custom application rule exists.

field.label: Match Type
field.help: Select which flow field should be matched. Domain checks server.name, IP and CIDR check client/server IPs, and port checks server.port.

field.label: Match Value
field.help: Value to match, for example alicdn.com, 10.10.10.132, 10.10.10.0/24, or 443.

field.label: Application Label
field.help: Custom application name shown in the active flow protocol column when this rule matches.
